segments.text: Namaste! Aaja ko topic sunera nai kehi manche dar le kaamp-kaamp-cha hola. Black Mamba.
keywords: black mamba snake close up wildlife photography

segments.text: Pehle — 'black' bhanya kaalo hudaina. Kobe Bryant ko nickname black mamba thiyo. Tara yo saap? Yo grey cha. Olive cha. Brown pani cha. Kaalo chaina.
keywords: black mamba color gray olive brown snake
black mamba body color pattern photograph

segments.text: Tara mukhbhitra? Pure kaalo. Ink jasto. TESAILE black mamba.
keywords: black mamba mouth open black ink inside
black mamba gaping mouth close up
black mamba black tongue inside mouth

segments.text: Yo saap ko speed kati cha thaha cha? 20 kilometer per hour.
keywords: snake speed 20 km per hour infographic
black mamba speed on ground photograph

segments.text: Timi daudchau? Half marathon? 10K? Yo saap le timilai daudaaucha.
keywords: running speed comparison human vs snake

segments.text: Usain Bolt — fastest human ever — 45 km/h. Black mamba — 20 km/h. Sounds slow? Terrain herus ta. Grass, rocks, jungle. Tyo condition ma timi kitna daudchau?
keywords: black mamba terrain grass rocks jungle
human running speed vs snake terrain infographic

segments.text: Good news — black mamba le manche khoji khoji daudaina. Defensive animal ho. Attack garna chaahdaina.
keywords: black mamba not chasing human illustration

segments.text: Bad news — feel threatened bhayo bhane? Roki-daina. Timi roki-daina bhaneko ho. Yo roki-daina.
Ek palta tokyo bhane kitna venom inject garchha? 100–120 milligram.
segments.kilograms: black mamba venom yield per bite infographic

segments.text: Tyo kitna dangerous cha bhannu paryo? 2 drops of black mamba venom — 2 drops — Ek adult manche lai marnu ko lagi pugchha.
keywords: two drops snake venom lethal dose diagram
black mamba venom lethal dose infographic

segments.text: Ani ek palta ma 400mg inject garna sakchha. Timi mathematician hau? Calculate garus.
keywords: black mamba venom 400 mg maximum yield

segments.text: Tokyopachi kya-kya hunchha? Pehle — slight tingling. 'Achha yo ta ke ho.'
keywords: black mamba bite first symptoms tingling

segments.text: 10 minutes — drooping eyelids. Vision blur.
keywords: blurred vision after snake bite medical diagram

segments.text: 20 minutes — can't swallow. Can't talk.
keywords: black mamba venom muscle paralysis diagram

segments.text: 45 minutes — paralysis starts. 7 hours — without antivenom? 100% fatality rate.
keywords: black mamba envenomation timeline 45 minutes 7 hours

segments.text: Tara ek kura. Black mamba le manche ma attack garna chaahdaina. Disturb nagara — jai halchha.
keywords: black mamba avoid human encounter nature

segments.text: Africa ma antivenom ko accessibility cha — fatality rate 20% ma jharyako cha. Pahile? Almost sabai marinthye.
keywords: antivenom treatment for black mamba bite
black mamba fatality rate with antivenom 20%

segments.text: Yo saap ko problem — yo wildlife habitat ma bascha. Manche ko gaau tyahi pugyo. Ko kasai bata bachda cha?
Black mamba — fastest, most venomous, most dramatic snake alive. Tara yo villain haina. Yo just... thriving cha.
keywords: fastest most venomous snake comparison chart

segments.text: Hami jasto nai. Bas, with better reflexes. Ra infinitely more dangerous. (smile) Namaste.
keywords: black mamba vs human reflexes comparison
black mamba danger to humans infographic
